name: Eijirōu Kirishima //halloween\\
description:
He wants to wear his hero outfit but that doesn’t count as a costume

I blinked and suddenly I had a valentine...

Just let this man wear his hero outfit!

You and Eijirōu (that’s how I spell his name) go costume shopping at a nice Halloween store (they didn’t have animatronics and scary stuff so you went!) and after looking around you decided you were gonna be ____ (what u wanna be) but Eijirōu couldn’t find anything ‘manly’ to his liking, so instead of being like “Babe, let’s go somewhere else” he decided to be like “Nah, Imma do my own thing” and decide to sneakily not get anything and when you guys went home, and opened the bag, all you found was your costume, which ment Eijirōu didn’t get one, he wanted to just wear his ‘manly’ hero costume

For my Denki lovers: I’ll make a Denki one! Promise!

For my Katsuki lovers: he ain’t getting one... maybe, I’ll think about it

For my Ochaco and Izuku lovers: THEY GETTING ONE!! I SWEAR!

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

“Nothing beats a jet2 holiday! And right now you can save 50 POUNDS per person! That’s 200 pounds off for a family of 4!”

HIS CURRENT AGE IS 24!

A COUPLE YEARS AFTER THE WAR! YOU GUYS ARE MARRIED
creator: Perks 6’7
